testcase.name: testThatGetAllCoursesReturnsAListOfCourses

code varchar(5) unique, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), name varchar(50), description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table course_rates ( course_id integer, created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, note float(53), user_id integer, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), comment varchar(150), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table courses ( created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, program_id integer, code varchar(5) unique, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), name varchar(50), photo_url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table program_accreditations ( accreditation_id integer not null, ends integer, program_id integer not null, starts integer, primary key (accreditation_id, program_id) ) Hibernate: create table program_rates ( created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, note float(53), program_id integer, user_id integer, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), comment varchar(150), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table programs ( created_by integer, duration integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, school_id integer, code varchar(5) unique, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), name varchar(50), photo_url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id integer generated by default as identity, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table school_rates ( created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, note float(53), school_id integer, user_id integer, created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), comment varchar(150), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table schools ( created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, code varchar(5) unique, created_at timestamp(6), creation timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), name varchar(50), city varchar(255), country varchar(255), cover_photo_url varchar(255), location varchar(255), logo_url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( created_by integer, id integer generated by default as identity, modified_by integer, role_id integer, birthday timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6), modified_at timestamp(6), lastname varchar(50), firstname varchar(100), qualification varchar(100), email varchar(255) unique, password varchar(255), diplomas varchar(255) array, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists course_rates add constraint FKksvr0lhog8yc0c290g45g1dgt foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists
